name: 不等式
subject: math
domain_name: 表达式与方程 / Expressions & Equations / Expressions & Equations
curriculum_points: 6.EE.5 Understand solving an equation or inequality as a process of answering a question: which values from a specified set, if any, make the equation or inequality true? Use substitution to determine whether a given number in a specified set makes an equation or inequality true.

6.EE.8 Write an inequality of the form x > c or x < c to represent a constraint or condition in a real-world or mathematical problem. Recognize that inequalities of the form x > c or x < c have infinitely many solutions; represent solutions of such inequalities on number line diagrams.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像
